attacking_style: Pure sprinter who lacks the tactical finesse for modern positioning battles. Shows raw power but frequently mistimes efforts, launching too early or getting trapped in technical finishes.
team_tactics: Chronic team support deficit across Cofidis and Direct Energy eras. Teams either lack organized sprint infrastructure entirely or commit resources too early, depleting him before optimal launch point.
terrain_preference: Flat sprints only. Exposed and dropped on any lumpy terrain with substantial climbing. Crosswind technical skill deficit negates raw power advantage even on flat stages.
vulnerability: Technical finishes with tight turns and barriers cause spatial awareness problems. Gets boxed, trapped, or squeezed repeatedly. Poor crosswind technique despite impressive raw power output.
key_patterns: Repeatedly boxed or trapped in technical finishes due to positioning/spatial awareness deficits (4 instances)
Team leadout consistently inadequate: isolated, early depletion, or complete infrastructure absence (5 instances)
Launch timing errors: starts sprint too early, leading out competitors instead (3 instances)
Dropped on any stage with lumpy profile or sustained climbing requirements (2 instances)
Crosswind technical skill insufficient despite raw power to bridge gaps solo (2 instances)
form_trajectory: positive: 2021 Paris-Nice second place shows resurgent sprint form after negative 2017-2019 period plagued by tactical/support issues
